provider: HKU School of Chinese Medicine BChinMed Regulations and Syllabuses
note: The current official file was published in April 2026 and states that its BChinMed syllabuses apply to students admitted in 2021-22 and thereafter, so it covers the 2026-27 cohort. This supplement records 55 unique explicitly coded courses: 34 required academic core courses, 10 closed-list disciplinary electives, 6 required clinical attachment, practicum or clerkship courses, and 5 language-enhancement courses or explicitly coded alternatives. The open Common Core pool and unspecified language or elective substitutes are excluded. Candidates complete 12 credits of disciplinary electives: 3 credits from the Year 1 list, 3 credits from the BCHM39xx list in Year 3, and 6 credits from that list in Year 4; listed electives are not necessarily offered every year. BCHM4608 spans Year 4 and Semester 1 of Year 5 and therefore receives no single recommended Year. Semester is recorded only for the seven courses explicitly identified as full-year or Summer Semester courses. BCHM6601 is the 90-credit final-year Clinical Clerkship and the published capstone experience; no additional unissued clinical-module codes are inferred.
